name: tinywar.io
description: Tinywar.io throws you into a ruthless sword-fighting free-for-all where a single hit means defeat. Fight to unlock all 10 character evolutions and boost your speed with each upgrade. Can you dominate the leaderboard and survive the longest?
instructions: Move the mouse to guide your character Click left mouse button - Attack Hold right mouse button - Speed Boost
tags: .io, .io Games, 1 Player, Action, attack, Casual, Fight, Sword
